mapper.sql: id, username, password, nickname, avatar_url, current_streak, max_streak, last_check_in, status, is_deleted, create_time, update_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM t_user WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT FROM t_user WHERE username = #{username} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_user (username, password, nickname, avatar_url, current_streak, max_streak, last_check_in, status, is_deleted) VALUES (#{username}, #{password}, #{nickname}, #{avatarUrl}, #{currentStreak}, #{maxStreak}, #{lastCheckIn}, #{status}, #{isDeleted})
